markers: src/app/page.tsx contains an embedded flashcard bank of 15 study cards and the main study-dashboard UI.
src/app/api/questions/route.ts generates review questions through z-ai-web-dev-sdk rather than reading a local lecture corpus.
src/app/api/upload/route.ts accepts .apkg uploads and falls back to mock Anki cards for demo study content.
No standalone lecture, algorithm, tutorial, or educational image dataset files were found outside the app shell.

summary.notes: This repository is primarily a Next.js scaffold with one embedded study deck, not a content repository organized around separate curriculum files.

tutorials.evidence: Lines 49-80 handle generated study questions, lines 90-145 handle Anki uploads, and lines 1442-1571 define the flashcard bank.

dependencies: src/app/api/questions/route.ts depends on z-ai-web-dev-sdk and network access for question generation.
src/app/api/upload/route.ts depends on unzip and uploaded .apkg files; it does not contain a source curriculum payload.
src/lib/anki-parser.ts is a processing dependency for uploaded cards, not source educational content.
recommendation: Migrate only the embedded study-card workflow if you want reusable review content; otherwise there is no standalone lectures, algorithms, or image corpus to stage from this repo.
